episodes.title: What's the off-ramp for the cult of MAGA?
episodes.description:
I asked a cult expert @KnittingCultLady! We covered: 
-Why the American military is…kind of a cult
-The “cultiness spectrum” — indicators that political people have gone from “informed” to “uh oh, I’m in a cult”
-What’s the off-ramp for people leaving the cult of MAGA?
